flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The Chicago School at Los Angeles rose 71% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $21.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The Chicago School at Los Angeles fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
